name: Offer Campaign
description: Promotional creatives for discounts, launches and limited-time deals
briefInstructions: This is a lead-generation creative. The image must convey premium value and urgency. Show the product or service in use — app on a screen, dashboard on a laptop, or the physical environment where this business operates. Target audience (the actual users) should appear if possible — engaged, professional, satisfied. The offer details will be rendered as text overlay, so reserve clear space at the bottom. The image itself communicates aspiration and trust, not the offer text.

inputs.label: Offer Headline
inputs.placeholder: e.g. 20% OFF, Free Setup, Launch Price

inputs.label: Offer Description
inputs.placeholder: e.g. Annual Subscription, All Features Included

inputs.label: Call to Action
inputs.placeholder: e.g. Book Demo, Claim Now, Get Started

inputs.label: Additional Subtext
inputs.placeholder: e.g. T&C apply. For new sign-ups only.
